signals.headline: Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98
signals.raw:
Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98.27% Approval | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Solana's Alpenglow upgrade, aimed at reducing transaction finality to 100-150 milliseconds, passed a governance vote with 98.27% in favor, positioning it as one of the fastest execution layers and potentially boosting network adoption amid April trading near $80.[5]  
No other confirmations, announcements, or

signals.headline: IMF Raises South Korea 2026 Inflation Forecast to 2
signals.raw:
IMF Raises South Korea 2026 Inflation Forecast to 2.5% Amid Middle East Oil Risks | YES | HIGH confidence** [3][5]

South Korea's March 2026 annual inflation rate was confirmed at 2.2%, up from 2.0% in February but below 2.4% forecasts, driven by a 9.9% surge in oil prices[1][2]. On April 14, 2026, the IMF released its World Economic Outlook, maintaining 2026 GDP growth at 1.9% while lifting the i
